title: ferolia campestris
intro: Ferolia campestris is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the field fleabane. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits associated with Ferolia campestris include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Ferolia campestris is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are prepared by steeping the plant's flowers, leaves, or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
